examples: Three of these heroes will be joining us at TechEd this June.
Once you are teched, you have opened the door to a few very powerful upgrades.
I had fun both talking about these things and showing some of these products and technologies in action here at TechEd.
According to WindowsPhoneNZ, the Mango device was sighted at TechEd New Zealand with HDMI-out support.
And as at SAPPHIRE, expect SAP at TechEd to show off the apps it is developing in-house, such as in the areas of field service, retail, and human resources.
